changes.value:
crates/code-context/src/layered_context.rs

Coverage: 21% (6/29 lines)

Most SymbolKind variants are never exercised. Write a parameterized test covering all LSP SymbolKind integer values (1–26) and verify the correct string is returned for each. Also test the fallback/unknown case for out-of-range values.
